watchlist.trigger: Long only on a 15-minute close above prior day high with volume >=1.5x the 20-bar 15-minute average, followed by a successful retest that holds above VWAP; enter on break of retest candle high.
watchlist.stop: Initial stop below retest swing low and below 15-minute VWAP support; hard stop distance capped to RL-002 risk budget.
watchlist.target: Scale 60% at +1.5R or near next daily resistance pivot, whichever comes first.
watchlist.note: Thesis contradiction: Some firms maintain Overweight while others shift to Underperform with lower targets.. Regime fragility: momentum failure in broad risk-off tape can break follow-through.

exit_candidates.overnight_risk: Elevated gap-down risk if weakness persists; avoid overnight carry under unresolved urgent signal.
